name: DirectPlayForce
description: Forces direct play for configured clients, blocking all server-side transcoding.
overview: Solves EAC3 / Dolby Digital Plus stuttering on NVIDIA Shield / Android TV by forcing the server to deliver media files as-is via direct play — no FFmpeg, no re-encoding, zero quality loss.

versions.changelog: Complete rewrite: direct play enforcement only. All transcoding logic removed.
